query: SELECT id, name, COALESCE(programId, -1) as progId, CASE WHEN programId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN programId = 0 THEN 'ZERO' ELSE CAST(programId AS CHAR) END as progType FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT id, name, COALESCE(programId, -1) as progId, CASE WHEN programId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN programId = 0 THEN 'ZERO' ELSE CAST(programId AS CHAR) END as progType FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Bruno Martins%';
